response.justification: Candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role. There is no demonstrated depth in Java, Kotlin, JVM internals, or the Spring ecosystem, and no experience building IDE features or language tooling. While there is a brief C/C++ stint on LabWindows/CVI (a C IDE), the bulk of recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which do not transfer to enterprise JVM tooling.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and developer tooling
Prior IDE-adjacent experience contributing C/C++ components to LabWindows/CVI
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing libraries, open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java/Kotlin listed only as a skill with no recent JVM-focused projects
Core experience is in TypeScript/Node and DLang, not enterprise JVM tooling

key_factors.factor: No Kotlin or modern Java production work
